name: moneyroll
description: 2D онлайн-RPG про то, как стать богатым.

scripts.dev:editor: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @moneyroll/server dev" "VITE_MR_MODE=editor pnpm --filter @moneyroll/client dev"
scripts.dev:build: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @moneyroll/server dev" "VITE_MR_MODE=editor pnpm --filter @moneyroll/client dev"
